response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly aligning with the role's AI requirement, and demonstrated ownership across backend, frontend, and DevOps. Multi-language proficiency, testing/TDD discipline, and Kubernetes/Docker exposure round out a senior profile that fits the role well.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work
13+ years across full stack with TDD, CI/CD, and architecture ownership
Polyglot background (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, DLang) with Docker/Kubernetes exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java backend service experience
Cloud experience skews AWS; no GCP/Azure signal
